Free for Educators

Resources That Actually Help

Practical tools, lesson samples, and frameworks built from real classroom experience. No fluff, no gated upsells — just genuinely useful resources for your teaching practice.

Lesson SamplesTeacher ToolsDownloadablesRecommended Tools

Free Lesson Samples

See the Teaching in Action

Preview complete lesson plans built on Science of Reading research. Each includes objectives, materials, procedures, and differentiation suggestions.

Science of ReadingK–2

Phonemic Awareness Warm-Up

A structured 10-minute warm-up routine that builds phonemic awareness through blending, segmenting, and manipulation activities.

Preview Lesson
Vocabulary3–5

Vocabulary in Context

A Tier 2 vocabulary lesson using context clues, morphology, and repeated exposure across reading and writing.

Preview Lesson
MLLs2–5

Multilingual Comprehension Scaffold

A comprehension lesson designed with built-in scaffolds for multilingual learners, including visual supports and sentence frames.

Preview Lesson

Free Teacher Tools

Systems That Save You Time

Planning templates, data trackers, and organizational tools designed by a teacher who actually uses them.

Small Group Planning Template

Organize your small group rotations, track student progress, and plan targeted instruction all in one place.

Get This Tool

Data Tracking Dashboard

A simple spreadsheet-based tracker for progress monitoring, running records, and assessment data across your class.

Get This Tool

Observation Notes Organizer

Capture meaningful anecdotal notes during instruction with this structured observation tool designed for busy teachers.

Get This Tool

Downloadables

Print, Use, Repeat

Quick-reference guides, templates, and checklists you can download and start using today.

PDF

Science of Reading Quick Reference

A one-page visual guide to the key components of structured literacy and the Science of Reading.

Download Free
PDF

Assessment Calendar Template

Plan your assessment windows, progress monitoring schedule, and data review cycles for the year.

Download Free
PDF

Parent Communication Templates

Ready-to-use letter templates for communicating reading progress, intervention plans, and home practice tips.

Download Free
PDF

Classroom Library Audit Checklist

Evaluate and organize your classroom library for diversity, reading levels, and student interest.

Download Free

Recommended Tools

Tools I Actually Use

Every tool here has been personally tested in my own teaching practice. I only recommend what I'd use in my own classroom.

Design & Materials

Canva for Education

Create beautiful presentations, worksheets, and visual aids with free education-specific templates.

Learn MoreClassroom Library

Bookshop.org

Support independent bookstores while building your classroom library. Curated lists for every grade level.

Learn MoreDigital Classroom

Kami

Annotate PDFs, create interactive worksheets, and provide digital feedback on student work.
